title: CS Mine
description: Play in the likeness of CS GO right in minecraft! There are about 17 types of guns and different sizes cartridges to choose from!
body:
# Modpack description
In this modpack, you will immerse yourself in the world of CS GO, where there are about 17 types of weapons, a lot of ammunition, the opportunity to purchase at the beginning of the game, and maps from CS GO! Play with friends, kill rivals in order to get money to buy more expensive weapons!!!

# How to start the game?
1. When you enter the world, you will find yourself in a room where you can customize the game (weather, friendly fire, time of day).
2. After setting up, select a team using the TR (team red) or TB (team blue) block, and then start the game using the SG (start game) block.
3. When you click on the game start block, teleport to your team's spawn point and get coins to buy ammunition.
4. On spawn, buy from merchants (merchants sell: weapons, ammunition, armor, etc.).
5. Play and kill enemies from the opposing team!
6. When all the players of any team are killed, the game will end and everything will start over.
![Start game and change team](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ac698ddfca125dde68b7c2450bc330efddca3eb.png)
![Game settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edea2ff560596a28855433a125972d5f80a6cbd7.png)
![Villager traders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df1cce86aecceef9b12f13358191cfea06bd6b87.png)

# What resources does the modpack have?
- At the moment, the modpack features several worlds with pre-configured maps. I want to highlight that the spawn of mobs, automatic day and night change, as well as weather are disabled in the maps. The default **game mode in the worlds is adventure**.
- I also want to note that **in config files I have configured the mods that are present in the modpack**.
- I also made a resource pack for the modpack to work.

# Please, attention
- Only more than 1 people can play.
- You decide for yourself who will be the host or you can transfer worlds, mods and config files to your server that you have created.
- If you are the server administrator, you can reset the game state using the "reboot TSP" button, which is located on each map from the outside of the game start room. But be careful with her!
![reboot TSP button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc1e8fd36ed0848dfefc28eaa4564c44287690c.png)
- You can also set up the transition to different maps using command blocks. But you have to edit them!
![World redirect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7948884eb37b1af62b7782b94cb27892811261b6.png)
- I also want to note that the skin system does not work in this build, because it is occupied by another mod that gives out the skin of a terrorist and a counter-terrorist.

# Mod list
- [Custom Villager Trades](https://modrinth.com/mod/nzF0Kr0W) by SpaceCat97
- [Re:Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/VG7AUzq2) by Sekwah
- [Server Redirect](https://modrinth.com/mod/YqkxTQEh) by KaiNoMood
- [Teams spawn points](https://modrinth.com/mod/Xc5wPOL2) by Sivel
- [SekC Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZJp6Tx9H) by Sekwah
- [Custom Villager Professions](https://modrinth.com/mod/NHs909GQ) by SpaceCat97
- [Timeless & Classics Guns: Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/SzzJttH8) by Serene Wave Studio | Timeless Squad
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ) by shedaniel

# Additional info
- _Teams spawn points_ mod is my mod! You can to configure this (see mod page on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/teams-spawn-points) or [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/teams-spawn-points))
- This modpack on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cs-mine) and [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cs-mine)
- If you need help: [Git issue](https://gitflic.ru/project/sivel/cs-mine_minecraft-modpack/issue)
- If you want to support me: [Donate](https://donate.stream/Sivel)

# Thanks this people:

- _Forgur_ - for testing modpack
- _KOT_STREAM (Котя#4057)_ - for creating the de_dust2 map
